case_title: TOVSHTEYN, DAVID vs. SINCHAK, GARY et al

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOVSHTEYN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SINCHAK, GARY LEMMERHIRT, CHRIS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT SINCHAK, GARY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINCHAK, GARY LEMMERHIRT, CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 141 EDDY STREET S.F. $964.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $964.60, STAYED UNTIL FEB-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS WAIVE & AGREE NOT TO MOVE FOR NEW TRIAL & APPEAL ON JDGMENT ENTERED HEREIN. PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING IS DEEMED TO BE PROPERTY OF PLTF. WAIVE RIGHT UNDER CCC1983. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COST. SECURITY DEPOSITS RETAINED.
